scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n dash,box,sp -c blue,green,magenta "npm -w @dashboard/app run dev" "npm -w @dashboard/boxout run dev" "npm -w @dashboard/simple-parts run dev"
scripts.build:all: npm -w @dashboard/boxout run build && npm -w @dashboard/simple-parts run build && npm -w @dashboard/app run build
